# Typical Action

<p align="right">
  <img src="https://github.com/marketplace/actions/Typical+Action/icon" alt="Icon for Action" height="50"/>
</p>

> A typical GitHub Action demonstrating common fields.

## Usage

<code>
- uses: your-org/@main
  with:
    greeting: # Greeting message (default: Hello)
    username: # GitHub username
</code>

## Inputs

- **greeting**: Greeting message (default: Hello)

- **username**: GitHub username (**required**)

## Outputs

- **message**: The output message

## Example

See the [action.yml](./action.yml) for a full reference.
